nasb.text: Then I said to them, ‘What is the high place to which you go?’ So its name is called Bamah to this day.” ’

esv.text: (I said to them, ‘What is the high place to which you go?’ So its name is called Bamah to this day.)

cnv.text: 我問他們：‘你們所去的那高處是甚麼地方？’於是那高處的名字叫巴麻，直到今日。

ccb.text: 我问他们，你们所去的高处是什么地方？’从此，那高处一直叫巴麻。
